name: jira
title: Jira MCP Server
description: Search Jira Cloud issues, inspect tickets, transition work, and fetch project context.

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Fetch a Jira issue with normalized fields, description text, and comments.

tools.name: search_issues
tools.description: Search Jira issues with JQL or structured filters and return normalized issue summaries.

tools.name: transition_issue
tools.description: Resolve a Jira transition by name or id, apply it, and return the updated issue.

resources.name: project
resources.description: Return normalized Jira project metadata as JSON.

prompts.name: incident_triage
prompts.description: Create a reusable incident-triage prompt using Jira issue context.
